zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard De Wynnington於1345年出生在英國英格蘭爾諾維其時，他的父親Robert de Wynnington, III56歲，母親Mrs Agnes De Wynnington25歲。他於1365年之前與Emma de Mainwaring結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1422年在他的家鄉享年77歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可布托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard De Wynnington于1345年出生在英国英格兰爾諾維其时，他的父亲Robert de Wynnington, III56岁，母亲Mrs Agnes De Wynnington25岁。他于1365年之前与Emma de Mainwaring结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1422年在他的家乡享年77岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可布托。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wynnington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: (i) locative name from Winnington (Cheshire, Staffs). (ii)  see  Wennington  .

variants.name: Wennington
meanings: English: (i) locative name from Wennington (Hunts, Essex). (ii)  see  Winnington  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Richard De Wynnington was born in 1345, in Northwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Wynnington, III, was 56 and his mother, Mrs Agnes De Wynnington, was 25. He married Emma de Mainwaring before 1365. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1422, in his hometown, at the age of 77, and was buried in Booton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard De Wynnington est né en 1345, à Northwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Wynnington, III, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Mrs Agnes De Wynnington, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Emma de Mainwaring avant 1365. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1422, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Booton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard De Wynnington 1345 in Northwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Wynnington, III 56 und seine Mutter Mrs Agnes De Wynnington 25. Er hat vor 1365 Emma de Mainwaring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1422 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Booton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard De Wynnington è nato il nel 1345 nel Northwich, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Wynnington, III, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Agnes De Wynnington, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Emma de Mainwaring prima del 1365. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1422, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Booton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard De Wynningtonが1345年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアノースウィチで生まれた時，父Robert de Wynnington, IIIは56歳，母Mrs Agnes De Wynningtonは25歳であった。1365年以前にEmma de Mainwaringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1422年に故郷で77歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクボオトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard De Wynnington(이)가 1345년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 노르스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Wynnington, III(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Agnes De Wynnington(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1365년 이전 Emma de Mainwaring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1422년 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 부턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard De Wynnington nasceu em 1345, em Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Wynnington, III, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Agnes De Wynnington, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma de Mainwaring antes 1365. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1422, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Booton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard De Wynnington родился в 1345 г. в местности нортвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Wynnington, III было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Agnes De Wynnington, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma de Mainwaring перед 1365 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1422 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности бутон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard De Wynnington nació en 1345, en Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Wynnington, III, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Mrs Agnes De Wynnington, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Emma de Mainwaring antes de 1365. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1422, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Booton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
